RuddyDoc HTML Test Document

This document exercises all key HTML structural elements.

Introduction

This is the first paragraph of the introduction section. It contains regular text to test basic paragraph parsing.

This is the second paragraph with bold text, italic text, and a hyperlink.

Lists

Unordered List

  • First item
  • Second item with inline code
  • Third item

Ordered List

  1. Step one
  2. Step two
  3. Step three
  4. Step four

Tables

Header 1 Header 2 Header 3
Row 1, Col 1 Row 1, Col 2 Spans two rows
Spans two columns
Row 3, Col 1 Row 3, Col 2 Row 3, Col 3

Code and Quotes

function example() {
    console.log("This is a code block");
    return 42;
}

This is a blockquote. It represents quoted material from another source.

It can contain multiple paragraphs.

Images and Figures
